title: Campaigns OS Workflow Finding v0
description: One operator-, agent-, or system-observed signal about the Campaigns OS workflow itself. Captured locally to the append-only Findings Journal. Strict about the required core; permissive about optional context fields.

id.description: Stable unique local ID, e.g. wf_<timestamp>_<random>. Local-only; not a cross-run primary key.

stage.description: Observation Stage: the lifecycle moment where the finding was noticed.

kind.description: Small operator-facing classification. Not a Linear label or priority.

summary.description: Short one-line description of the finding.

severity.description: Free-form operator severity hint. Not a launch gate.

artifact_paths.description: References to artifacts (packet, report, doctor output, QA verdict). Paths only — not contents.

run_id.description: Optional canonical Run Telemetry run_id. Lets a per-run Run Record snapshot this finding by ID exactly, rather than inferring run membership from timestamps. Backward-compatible: absent on findings captured before Run Telemetry.

author_type.description: Source of the finding. Agents may record observed workflow gaps but must not invent subjective operator feedback.

evidence_quality.description: Declared strength of evidence. Lets useful weak signals enter the Learning Trail without pretending to be QA Verdicts.

suggested_owner.description: Optional routing aid for later internal aggregation. Not the first clustering dimension.

safe_to_share.description: Operator hint that this finding's summary/references are safe to contribute beyond the workspace. Does not itself trigger any upload.
